Event: Royal Challenge - Season 49
Event Date: 01/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI325
Oath of Loyalty Ring

Once in a while, the unit deals pure damage to all enemy units, equal to 35% of their maximum health, and steals 30% of all stats from them for 4 sec. Stacks up to 8 times. Each of the affected enemy units also has a 60% chance to be stunned for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
